✦ Simple Process

Three steps to a spotless yard

We do all the dirty work. You just enjoy your outdoor space again.

01📋

Book Online

Fill out our quick form, pick your plan. We confirm the same day.

02🧹

We Show Up

Rakes, scoops, dustpans & sealed bags. We bring it all and haul it away.

03📱

You Get a Text

Before we arrive and when we're done. Full transparency every time.

04😎

Enjoy Your Yard

Step outside barefoot. Throw the ball. Actually use your space again.

✦ Why Desert Scoops

Built for desert yards & desert dogs

We're not a generic lawn service. We know the valley and we know dogs.

🌵

Desert Experts

Rocky soil, gravel, cacti — our crew navigates it all without missing a single pile.

🧹

Full Toolkit

Rakes, dustpans, scoops & sealed bags. We bring everything and haul it all away clean.

📅

Flexible Plans

Weekly, bi-weekly, or one-time. Change or cancel anytime — no questions asked.

🔔

SMS Updates

A text when we're on our way, another when we're done. Total peace of mind.

🐕

Dog People

We genuinely love dogs. Your pups are always safe, happy, and respected.

♻️

Eco Responsible

Proper disposal every time. Equipment sanitized between every yard we touch.

Simple plans, no surprises

🐕 The numbers don't lie

The average dog produces ~274 lbs of waste per year. That's a lot of raking — let us handle it while you enjoy your yard under the desert sky.

✦ Our Story

Locally owned, dog obsessed

Born from one simple idea: dog owners shouldn't spend their weekends cleaning up after their pups.
